title: alchemilla xanthochlora f. amphitricha
intro: Alchemilla xanthochlora f. amphitricha, a lesser-known member of the buckwheat family, is a type of flowering plant with medicinal properties. It has been used for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Alchemilla xanthochlora f. amphitricha include its ability to reduce swelling, improve skin tone, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, ointments, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area or ingested as a tincture or tea.
